DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1, THE COURT CONSTRUES THE MOTION AS A MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADING AND DENIES IT BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS ADEQUATELY REFERENCED COMMON CARRIER LIABILITY. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO CAUSE OF 2 IS GRANTED. THE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS THERE BEING THE EXISTENCE OF A NON-TRIVIAL DANGEROUS CONDITION. MS. MEYER TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301)
